_note: F-1 reference fixture. Validates pipeline behavior on a resolved operational service outage with documented root cause and corrective actions. No escalation expected.
submitter_note: Post-incident report — payment service outage resolved, root cause documented
case_description: Post-incident report for a 4-hour payment service outage caused by a misconfigured cron job. The incident is resolved, no data loss occurred, and corrective actions are documented. Expected to produce Medium severity without escalation — the incident is contained, root-cause is clear, and no ongoing risk is present. This case tests that the pipeline does not over-escalate fully resolved operational incidents.
